highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 2.80.2 finishes Uno Platform support, wires WASM + GL for Uno, and fixes stream, text, and platform bugs.
highlights_body: Uno Platform gets GPU views, WASM support, and refreshed package versions. Alongside that, the release fixes non-seekable stream handling for SKData, several text-rendering regressions, and platform-specific issues on macOS, UWP, and ASP.NET.

bullets.detail: Adds GPU views for Uno, WASM support for Uno, and refreshes the Uno package versions and samples.
The SKGraphics diagnostics surface (font cache limits, purge, memory dump) is now available from managed code, alongside a few additional GPU debugging members.
New extension methods make it easier to convert to and work with SKColorF values.
Creating SKData from a stream that can't seek no longer fails, and SKSurface.Create honours the origin parameter that was previously ignored.
Uses linear metrics for backwards compatibility, handles invalid text without crashing, and fixes an iOS NullReferenceException in SKCanvas.DrawTextOnPath.

bullets.lead: WASM + GL uses the correct natives
bullets.detail: The WASM build now picks up the correct native code for GL rendering.
Overwrites the underlying pixel where it should, reverts a bad SetScaleTranslate path, and adjusts a float-return signature that couldn't be used everywhere.
SkiaSharp now checks the correct directory for its native libraries when hosted under ASP.NET.
The macOS view now invalidates via NeedsDisplay instead of the eager Display call, matching platform expectations.

bullets.lead: UWP no longer blocks the UI thread on invalidate
bullets.detail: UWP invalidation is now non-blocking, removing a source of hangs when redrawing frequently.
Bundled Skia is updated to pick up an upstream fix for issue #465.

contributor_summaries.ziriax: Fixed the iOS NullReferenceException in SKCanvas.DrawTextOnPath and the ignored origin parameter in SKSurface.Create

preview_summaries.2.80.2-p36: Preview 36 fixed ASP.NET native library discovery, macOS NeedsDisplay behaviour, and added GPU debugging APIs.
preview_summaries.2.80.2-p33: Preview 33 exposed SKGraphics, unblocked the UWP UI thread on invalidate, and added SKColorF extensions.
preview_summaries.2.80.2-p19: Preview 19 reverted a bad SetScaleTranslate and corrected pixel writes.
preview_summaries.2.80.2-p18: Preview 18 fixed WASM + GL native selection and shipped text-rendering fixes (linear metrics, invalid text).
preview_summaries.2.80.2-p9: Preview 9 landed the Uno Platform expansion — GPU views, WASM support, and refreshed package versions.
